DuPod Production Control
Secure access for production, casting, stock, and workstation execution.
Login: enter your assigned username and password. For access support, contact the system administrator.

DuPod Production Control

Production execution, slab control, station stock, and main assembly readiness
Connecting to Supabase…

Dashboard

Exports use the currently selected dashboard module.

Production Control Dashboard Home

Choose the dashboard based on the decision you need to make. The home page shows the main control panels, current risks, and the top items needing attention.

OK / Ready In Progress Carry-over / Attention Hold / Blocked Inactive / Closed

Main Control Panels

Click any card to open the dashboard.

Top 5 Focus Lists

Ranked items for fast daily review.

Slab Type Dashboard

Each card represents one Project + Pod Type. Later the middle icon area can be replaced by a slab image/layout thumbnail.

Latest Events

Bottleneck / Open Work by Workstation

Casting Work Orders

Oracle slab casting work order progress by Project + Pod Type.

Casting Completion Forecast

Shows remaining qty to maximum, open Oracle WO coverage, and whether a new Oracle casting WO may be needed.

Project Summary Dashboard

High-level project view across slab progress and subassembly execution. Completion is based on released quantities, not total maximum quantity.

Action Required

Only the items that need attention are shown here: stock shortages, pending releases, holds, bottlenecks, and readiness blockers.

Batch Tracking Dashboard

Each demand batch remains separate. New demand is added after previous batches and is not mixed with older batches.

Bottleneck Dashboard

Ranks workstations based on open qty, hold qty, and readiness blocking impact.

Delay / Carry-over Dashboard

Shows open work that was not finished from previous days or previous demand batches.

Production Readiness Score

Readiness Score measures activity completion progress for each Project + Pod Type + Batch before main assembly readiness.

Daily Control

Daily meeting view: demand, released work, execution queue, carry-over, hold reasons, and workstation completion summary.

Workstation Completion / Load Summary

Daily Details

Workstation Performance

Shows workload and completion by workstation. Click the work order count to see WO numbers.

Issue Summary

Open Hold Details

Ready for Main Assembly

Final handover control: actual ready quantity for main assembly, readiness details, activity counts, and next action to push.

Casting

Casting Team workspace for adding casting stock, generating casting reports, and raising casting correction / transfer requests.

Add Casting / Stock IN

Select Project Number and Pod Type. The Work Order No. is loaded from imported Oracle slab casting work orders. If one open WO exists, it is auto-selected; if multiple open WOs exist, the user must select the correct one; if no open WO exists, casting is blocked. Slab stock is created only from this casting transaction.

Daily Casting Report

Generate casting reports by date range. Use Excel for detailed review and PDF for formal daily/weekly reporting.

Casting Correction / Transfer Request

Use this section when a casting entry was submitted wrongly. The system keeps the original record and creates an auditable correction request. Approval is required before the stock is changed.

Slab Stock

Admin and Process Control workspace for stock balance, slab production progress, slab transactions, and casting correction approvals.

Stock Balance

Use the filters below and click any table header to sort ascending/descending.

Slab Production Progress Against Maximum Qty

Accumulated production qty is calculated from all slab casting transactions for each Project + Pod Type. Maximum qty comes from the Project / Pod Type Master. Use filters and click table headers to sort.

Slab Transactions

Filter slab movement history and click any header to sort ascending/descending.

Casting Correction Approval

Supervisor approval applies the correction and records all adjustment transactions. Rejected requests remain in the audit trail.

Daily Demand

Daily Demand Entry & Import

Daily Demand Preview Before Release Proposal

Daily Demand History

Review demand batches already converted to slab release proposals. Export by single date, date range, or whole history.

Slab Release & Delivery

Workflow: Daily Demand ? Casting Team confirms shipment ? Production Supervisor confirms delivery ? Work orders are generated for delivered qty only.

Slab Loading & Offloading Planning

Use this visual planning area after slab release to generate trailer loading stacks, confirm loading, confirm offloading to storage, and then feed the Slab Flow board. Master data for slab dimensions and trailer capacity is maintained in the Master Data tab.

Loading Plan & Offloading Plan

Create visual loading and offloading plans for released slabs. Slab dimensions and trailer settings are maintained in Master Data.

Requested Slabs Queue

Visual Trailer Loading Plan

Top view + stack side view

Offloading / Storage Stack View

Highest priority accessible first after offloading

Pending Shipment - Casting Team

Requested Qty is read-only. Casting team updates Ship Qty Now, selects lines, then confirms shipment once for selected lines. Stock reduces at shipment.

Pending Delivery - Production Supervisor

Supervisor updates Deliver Qty Now, selects lines, then confirms delivery. Work orders are generated only for delivered qty. Any delivery difference creates a review issue.

Old / Closed Requests

Completed, closed, cancelled, and held requests for traceability.

Show / Hide Old Requests

Slab Entry Layout

Control Actions

Sync delivered slab releases, then build the visual floor-preparation flow. Loading/offloading planning is available in Slab Release & Delivery. Floor preparation status is read-only and comes from existing work orders for FWP, FTILE and FGR.

Storage / Not Placed

Cards waiting for distribution to Waterproofing.

Admin Layout Settings

Columns should normally be the same across all zones to support same-column movement and row movement.

Movement Log

Main Production Lines

Workstation Screen

Advanced Filter

Work Orders

Work Order Dashboard

Supervisor overview by Project + Pod Type. Each card groups all activity work orders for the selected pod type and demand batch.

Order Management

Generated Work Orders Control

Supervisor/Admin tool to update order details such as Building, Level, Zone and Location Notes. Excel export uses gray read-only columns and green editable columns for safe bulk updates, or edit one line using the popup.

Order Management Correction Log

Audit trail for popup edits and Excel imports.

Ready for Main Assembly

Station Stock

Stations

Select a station first. The stock control cards and grouped pod type details will update based on your selection.

Station Stock Control

Activity Master

Activity Master Upload

Download the current master, edit it, then upload it back for preview before applying.

Activity Upload Preview

Current Activity Master

Settings

User Management, Access Matrix & System Data

Admin-only area for users, role access matrix, backup, restore, and reset tools.

Admin Only Users

User Management

Create and maintain user accounts. Each user has a role, active status, and optional assigned workstation.

User Entry & Import

Add users manually or upload a file. Workstation is required only for Workstation Operator users.

User Preview Before Update

Review manual/uploaded users before applying. Duplicate usernames and invalid workstation assignments are blocked.

Current Users

Active users can log in. Inactive users are blocked from login without deleting their record.

Access Matrix

Review role-based visibility and action permissions.

Admin can download the current access matrix, update it in Excel, then import it back. Use Access = Yes or No.

Access Matrix Preview Before Update

Review imported role access before applying. This controls tab and dashboard visibility.

Operational Cutover & Opening WIP

Admin control for separating historical records from active Trailer Loading and Slab Entry work.

Trailer and Slab Entry Go-Live Control

History remains available, while operational screens show only records on/after the cutover date or records explicitly retained as opening WIP.

Setup required

For selected shipment lines: first select the required lines in Slab Release & Delivery, then return here and click “Keep Selected Shipment Lines as Opening WIP”.

System Data

Controlled tools for system backup, restore, reference data loading, and reset.

Master Data

Master Data

Process Control workspace for project/pod masters and Oracle slab casting work order imports.

Master Data Imports

Project / Pod Type Master

Add, preview, upload, maintain, deactivate, or delete Project + Pod Type master records.

Project / Pod Type Entry & Import

Download the current Project/Pod master, edit it, then upload it again. Pod Type is also the display name, so no separate Pod Type Name field is required.

Project / Pod Type Preview Before Update

Review the imported/manual lines before updating the master list.

Projects & Pod Types

Delete rule: Delete is allowed only when the Project + Pod Type has zero related records. Deactivate is allowed anytime and keeps history safe.

Project / Pod Type Slab Dimensions & Trailer Master

Maintain slab dimensions by Pod Type as part of the Project / Pod Type master. Trailer master settings are also maintained here and used by the Slab Release & Delivery loading/offloading plan.

2. Slab Casting Work Order Import

Import and manage Oracle slab casting work orders used by the casting team.

Slab Casting Work Order Entry & Import

Add Oracle slab casting work orders manually or upload a file. All lines go first to preview before updating the imported WO list. Project + Pod Type must already exist in the master.

Slab Casting Work Order Preview Before Update

Review, edit, or remove manual/uploaded lines before applying. Invalid lines must be fixed by first adding the Project + Pod Type in the Project / Pod Type Master.

Imported Slab Casting Work Orders

Filter, sort, and review imported Oracle slab casting work orders.

Daily Station Backlog

Supervisor Daily Station Backlog

End-of-day station execution summary: opening carry over, new work assigned today, completed today, and closing carry over for the next day.

Station Activity Details

Rows are grouped by station/activity/pod type so the supervisor can review the planned workload for the day, completed quantity, and closing carry over.

Completed Today Report

Completed Work by Date / Shift

Shows only activities completed during the selected date and shift window. Use it to review what was actually finished, by station, operator, batch, and pod type.

Shift windows use the current default shift calendar. Night shift includes completions from 19:00 on the selected date until 07:00 the next day.

Completed Activity Details

Each row represents a completed activity line captured during the selected date/shift window.

Complete Quantity
Select quantity to complete.
Required
0
Done
0
Remaining
0

This records the completion timestamp when saved.

Put on Hold
Select hold reason.
Edit Order Details
Update building, level and location details.
